name: Hugh Morris
description:
i promise you when i went to look for art to use hugh as a bride was NOT what i was looking for but its better than what i was looking for

anyways i feel better now and the first thing im doing is making a hugh morris bot because LIVING THE DREAM TOMORROW (in my timezone) YEAHHH

three of the starter messages are just him showing up at your door for a date, theres three of them because he has a different fit on in each because i can yea yes yeah uh huh.

anyways ENJOY and hopefully i can get back to doing more bots soon! (not tomorrow cuz im gonna be playing the new tomodachi life all day heh)
creator: AlistarTheEagle
